violations.text: Frappe mix labeled "KEEP REFRIGERATED" was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit in the frappe lowboy refrigeration unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, items were placed in the unit over 4 hours prior to inspection. Food was voluntarily disposed of by person in charge. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

The following was observed to be in poor repair: 1) The frappe prep unit was observed in poor repair (maintaining an ambient temperature of 48 degrees Fahrenheit). Unit to not be used until it can be serviced/replaced/repaired. 2) The sanitizer dispenser was observed to be continuously leaking into the sanitizer bay. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023

The floors in the walk in freezer and under equipment in back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the kitchen area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
